mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, name, phone, status, role, create_time as createTime FROM user WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, name, phone, status, role, create_time as createTime FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, name, phone, status, role, create_time as createTime FROM user WHERE role != 'admin' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT id, username, name, phone, status, role, create_time as createTime FROM user WHERE status = 1 AND role != 'admin' AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE status = 1 AND role != 'admin'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE status = 1 AND role != 'admin' AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.name, u.phone, u.status, u.role, u.create_time as createTime, COUNT(b.id) as borrowCount FROM user u LEFT JOIN borrow b ON u.id = b.user_id WHERE u.status = 1 GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY borrowCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, name, phone, status, role, create_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{status}, #{role}, #{createTime})
